name: forge-sim
description: forge-sim plugin marketplace: local Forge runtime simulator with skills and MCP server for fast Forge app development without cloud round-trip.

plugins.name: forge-sim
plugins.description: Local-first Forge app development workflow. Bundles the forge-local-dev skill (the iterate-and-test phase of Forge dev) with forge-sim's MCP server. Complements Atlassian's forge-skills plugin (forge-app-builder, forge-app-review, forge-debugger, forge-connector): this plugin owns the develop-and-test loop in between scaffold and deploy.
